title: VS: Collision damage
description: Adds destruction to Valkyrien skies structures
body:
## This mod adds damage to Valkyrien skies construction from collisions.

The damage depends on the speed of the collision. So far, the damage is only between ships, the damage from the blocks of the world will appear later.
You can customize the settings in the config file yourself "vs_collision_damage-common.toml"

### Dependencies:

- VS 2.4+

- Create big cannons (preferably, for the exact mass of Copycats) 

**I recommend use only PlysX backend (/vs backend engine physx) and /vsCollision mode PhysX.**

There are two modes of operation:

-  /vsCollision mode PhysX - if you are using PhysX, it is recommended.
    (/vs backend engine physx) 

-  /vsCollision mode Krunch - if you are using Krunch (it can also work with PhysX)



How it work? Just watch demo<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2Q1Y_hKAc6I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Дерби от сервера Vestalis: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/w7O4Z4CXHOo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**Warning**: The mod is in alpha version, make backups of your worlds. Expect improvements in the next updates, if you find a bug or do you have any ideas for improvement, please report it in the github issue.




_In the plans:_

- Entity damage

- rebalance/improve damage
 
- full-fledged destruction of the blocks of the world 
 
- Destruction from world block collisions

- Add fire 
  
- add effects
  
- fix the sounds
 
- ~~optimization~~
